nasb.text: “How often is the lamp of the wicked put out, Or does their calamity fall on them? Does God apportion destruction in His anger?

esv.text: “How often is it that the lamp of the wicked is put out? That their calamity comes upon them? That God distributes pains in his anger?

cnv.text: 惡人的燈何嘗熄滅？ 災難何嘗臨到他們身上？ 　神何嘗在忿怒中把痛苦分給他們！

ccb.text: “恶人的灯何曾熄灭？ 灾难何曾临到他们？ 上帝何曾发怒使他们受苦？
